STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-DEFEND_KOMACHI.title: Defend

STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-DETONATE_TOKEN.title: Detonate
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-RELEASE_TOKEN.title: Release
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SHOOT_AND_MOVE.title: Shoot And Move
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-MOVE_AND_SHOOT.title: Move And Shoot
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SCYTHE_OF_FINAL_JUDG:
[gold]Optional[/gold]: [gold]Displace[/gold] to any [gold]Distance[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Damage reduction of far [gold]Distances[/gold] increases this card's damage by double the amount instead.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-HANDY_RETREAT.descri:
[gold]Optional[/gold]: [gold]Displace[/gold] by up to +{Value1:diff()}.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If target's [gold]Distance[/gold] is 5, add a Manipulate [gold]Distance[/gold] to the hand.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-HANDY_RETREAT.title: Handy Retreat
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-ENDLESS_WAY.descript:
Remove all [gold]Block[/gold] from the target.
[gold]Displace[/gold] by +{Value1:diff()}.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-ENDLESS_WAY.title: Endless Way
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-DISTANCE_TAX.descrip:
Apply the following to each enemy, depending on its [gold]Distance[/gold]:
1-2: {Value1:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
3: Lose {Value2:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
4-5: {Value3:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-DISTANCE_TAX.title: Distance Tax
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-TASTE_OF_DEATH.title: Taste Of Death
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-PUSH_DRAW.descriptio:
[gold]Optional[/gold]: [gold]Displace[/gold] by up to +{Value1:diff()}.
Draw card's equal to that enemy's [gold]Distance[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-PUSH_DRAW.title: Pushback Draw
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SCYTHE_OF_THE_REAPER:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Every time an enemy is [gold]Displaced[/gold], put this card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] to the [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SHINIGAMI_FINESSE.de:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {CalculatedDamage:diff()} time{CalculatedDamage:plural:|s}.
This card attacks a number of times equal to the target's [gold]Distance[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show:+1|}.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-FLEXIBLE_WORK_SCHEDU: Gain {Value1:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] each time an enemy is [gold]Displaced[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-HARDWORKING_SHINIGAM:
{IfUpgraded:show:Add a [gold]Manipulate Distance[/gold] to the [gold]Hand[/gold]
|}At the start of your turn, if you have no [gold]Manipulate Distance[/gold] in your [gold]Hand[/gold], add one.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-PUSH_N_PULL.descript:
{IfUpgraded:show:Add a [gold]Manipulate Distance[/gold] to the [gold]Hand[/gold]
|}At the start of your turn, [gold]Displace[/gold] all enemies by [blue]-1[/blue].
At the end of your turn, [gold]Displace[/gold] all enemies by [blue]1[/blue].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-PUSH_N_PULL.title: Push and Pull
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-GOD_OF_DEATH.descrip:
The next time you would be defeated this combat, heal to half the maximum HP and gain 1 [gold]Intangible[/gold] instead.
Remove [gold]God of Death[/gold] from your Deck when this is applied. You can only revive once with this effect per combat.
Whenever an enemy is defeated, if it was a [gold]Minion[/gold], [gold]Summon[/gold] {Heal:diff()}. Otherwise, heal {Heal:diff()} HP.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-GOD_OF_DEATH.title: God Of Death
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-FLOW_OF_THE_SANZU_RI:
Add a [gold]Manipulate Distance[/gold] to the [gold]Hand[/gold].
Each time an enemy is [gold]Displaced[/gold]:
- If the [gold]Distance[/gold] was increased, gain [blue]{Value1:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold] this turn.
- If the [gold]Distance[/gold] was decreased, gain [blue]{Value1:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-RIVERSIDE_GARDEN.des:
Whenever a [gold]Spider Lily[/gold] is created, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it.
Add 1 [gold]Spider Lily[/gold] to each of the [gold]Hand[/gold], [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], and [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SHINIGAMI_TACTICS.de:
{IfUpgraded:show:Add a [gold]Manipulate Distance[/gold] to the [gold]Hand[/gold]
|}Whenever [gold]Distance[/gold] is changed by [gold]Manipulate Distance[/gold]: If it reduced [gold]Distance[/gold], add a random Attack into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. If it increased [gold]Distance[/gold], add a random Skill to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-WEED_CUTTER.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw 1 card.
Add a [gold]Manipulate Distance[/gold] to the hand.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-WEED_CUTTER.title: Weed Cutter
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SCYTHE_PARRY.descrip:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add a [gold]Manipulate Distance[/gold] to the hand.
Blocked attack damage is reflected to your attacker this turn.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SCYTHE_PARRY.title: Scythe Parry
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-COIN_THROW.title: Coin Throw
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-MOVING_DEFEND.descri:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
For each enemy whose [gold]Distance[/gold] is {Value1:diff()} or more, add a [gold]Manipulate Distance[/gold] to your [gold][/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-MOVING_DEFEND.title: Moving Defend
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-PROTECTIVE_SANZU_BOA:
[gold]Displace[/gold] by +{Value1}.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Summon[/gold] equal to the target's [gold]Distance[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show: times {Value2}|}.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-WORK_FOCUS.descripti: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] up to {Value1:diff()} cards from the [gold]Hand[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show:, [gold]Draw[/gold] pile, or [gold]Discard[/gold] pile}. Add that many [gold]Manipulate Distances[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold]. If an [gold]Upgraded[/gold] card was [gold]Exhausted[/gold] this way, also add a [gold]Spider Lily[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-WORK_FOCUS.title: Work Focus
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-WORK_FOCUS.selection: Select cards to [gold]Exhaust[/gold]. If an [gold]Upgraded[/gold] card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], add a [gold]Spider Lily[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-ACCOMPANYING_SPY_SPI:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Each time the target is [gold]Displaced[/gold], [gold]Summons[/gold] {Value1:diff()}.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SLICE_OF_HIGAN.descr:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage 2 times.
Whenever an enemy is Displaced, increase this card's damage by {Value1:diff()} for the rest of combat.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SLICE_OF_HIGAN.title: Slice Of Higan
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-EQUALIZE_DISTANCE.de:
[gold]Displace[/gold] until [gold]Distance[/gold] is 3.
Draw {Value1:diff()} card{Value1:plural:|s} for each level [gold]Displaced[/gold].
If [gold]Distance[/gold] is already 3, draw {Value2} and discard 1 card instead.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-RITUAL_OF_ECSTASY.de:
{AltDescription:choose(0|1):Invert target's [gold]Distance[/gold], then apply 1 of the following effects. If the [gold]Distance[/gold] is 3, you can choose the effect instead:
If the [gold]Distance[/gold] was increased, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. If it was reduced, draw {Value1:diff()} cards.|{ExtraDescription1}|{ExtraDescription2}}
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-EXCHANGE_LIFE.descri:
If the target's HP is lower than your max HP, switch your current HPs. Remove this card from the library if healed from it.
[gold]When drawn[/gold]: Lose {Value1:diff()} HP and gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-EXCHANGE_LIFE.title: Exchange Life
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-GRUDGING_STRIKE.desc:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {VengefulSpiritApplication:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold].
[gold]Release[/gold] {ReleaseCost:diff()}: Add a [gold]Detonate+[/gold] to the [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SPIRIT_DEFENSE.title: Human Spirits Passing By
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-NO_HARD_FEELINGS.des:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Apply {Value1:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold].
[gold]Optional[/gold]: [gold]Detonate[/gold] the target. It loses 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn for every {Value2} [gold]Spirits[/gold] detonated.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-GRUDGE_OF_THE_DEAD.d:
Each time [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] are [gold]Detonated[/gold], gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
Apply {Value1:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirit[/gold] to ALL enemies.
[gold]Optional[/gold]: [gold]Detonate[/gold] ALL enemies.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-BOUND_SPIRITS_OF_EAR:
Apply {Value1:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] on each enemy.
At the end of your turn, apply {Value2:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] on each enemy that already has it.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-GUIDING_SANZU.title: Guiding Sanzu
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-BOOM_BENEFITS.title: Siren's Bounty
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SWEEP.description:
[gold]Displace[/gold] ALL enemies by {Value1:diff()}.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Manipulate Distance{Cards:plural:|s}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SWEEP.title: Sweeping Scythe
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-VENGEFUL_SWEEP.descr:
Apply {Value1:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] to ALL enemies.
[gold]Release[/gold] {ReleaseCost:diff()}: Apply it again.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-VENGEFUL_SWEEP.title: Spirits of the Firm
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-VENGEFULER_SWEEP.des:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Apply {Value1:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] to ALL enemies.
[gold]Release[/gold] {Value2}: Do the above effect again.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-VENGEFULER_SWEEP.ext:
[gold]Release[/gold] {Value2}: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Apply {Value1:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] to ALL enemies.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-FREE_TRAUMA.descript:
Apply {Value1:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold].
[gold]Release[/gold] {Value2:diff()} or {Value3:diff()}: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} for every {Value2} [gold]Spirits[/gold] released.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-FREE_TRAUMA.title: Free Trauma?!
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-TALKATIVE_FERRYMAN.d:
At the start of your turn, gain {Value1:diff()} [gold]Guided Spirits[/gold].
[gold]Release[/gold] {Value2:diff()}: At the start of your next turn, gain {Value3:diff()} [gold]Guided Spirits[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-TALKATIVE_FERRYMAN.e: [gold]Release[/gold] {Value2:diff()}: At the start of your next turn, gain {Value3} [gold]Guided Spirits[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-FOREVER_CANCELLED.de:
Apply {Value1:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold].
Each time [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] are [gold]Detonated[/gold] on an enemy, apply half the detonated amount (rounding up) to that enemy.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SPIRITUAL_STRIKE.des:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] equal to damage dealt.
Increase duration of that enemy's [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] by 1.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-CHAIN_DETONATION.des:
Apply {Value1:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold].
[gold]Detonate[/gold] that enemy.
Apply [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] equal to the amount detonated.
[gold]Release[/gold] {Value2:diff()}: [gold]Detonate[/gold] that target again.
[gold]Release[/gold] {Value3:diff()}: Apply [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] equal to the amount detonated, again.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-CHAIN_DETONATION.ext: [gold]Release[/gold] {Value3}: Apply [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] equal to the amount detonated, again.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-RESIDUAL_AETHER.desc:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
[gold]While in Hand[/gold]: Whenever an enemy is [gold]Detonated[/gold], this gives an additional {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-QUICK_NAP.descriptio:
Gain {Heal:diff()} HP.
Next turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
End your turn.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-QUICK_NAP.title: Quick Nap
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SCYTHE_OF_ROAMING_SP:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. Deals {Value1:diff()} additional damage for each [gold]Vengeful Spirit[/gold] on the enemy.
If this kills an enemy, apply [gold]Vengeful Spirit[/gold] equal to the amount that enemy had on each other enemy.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SCYTHE_OF_EXORCISM.d:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Optional[/gold]: [gold]Detonate[/gold], then if {Value1:diff()} or more [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] were [gold]Detonated[/gold], add a [gold]Spider Lily[/gold] to your hand.
[gold]Release[/gold] {Value2:diff()}: Apply {Value1:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] before detonation. Gain 1 [gold]Artifact[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-EYE_OF_THE_STORM.des:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain {Value1:diff()} [gold]Guided Spirits[/gold].
Apply {Value2:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] to ALL enemies.
[gold]Release[/gold] {ReleaseCost:diff()}: [gold]Summon[/gold] {Summon:diff()}.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-DIVINE_PROTECTION.de:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain {Value1:diff()} [gold]Divine Spirits[/gold].
[gold]Release[/gold] {ReleaseCost:diff()}: Gain {Value1:diff()} more [gold]Divine Spirits[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SPIRIT_RETURN.descri: At the start of your turn, add up to 1 card from the [gold]Exhaust[/gold] pile with an energy cost of 1 or less to your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It gains [gold]Clone[/gold] and is removed from combat when played.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SPIRIT_RETURN.title: Spirit Return
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-MINISTRY_WORK.descri:
Choose 1 of {Value1:diff()} random cards. Add 1 to the [gold]Hand[/gold] and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] the rest.
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-MINISTRY_WORK.select: Choose a card to add to your [gold]Hand[/gold]. The rest are [gold]Exhausted[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-MINISTRY_WORK.title: Ministry Work
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SPIRIT_BARRIER.descr:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Release[/gold] All: [gold]Summon[/gold] equal to the amount of [gold]Spirits[/gold] released.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SPIRIT_BARRIER.extra: [gold]Release[/gold] All: [gold]Summon[/gold] equal to the amount of [gold]Spirits[/gold] released.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SPIRIT_BARRIER.title: Spirit Barrier
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-AFTERLIFE_PASSAGE.de: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] 1-{Value3:diff()} cards from your [gold]Hand[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show: or [gold]Discard[/gold] Pile}. For each card Exhausted: If it was a [gold]Status[/gold], [gold]Curse[/gold], or [gold]Basic[/gold] card: Gain {Value1:diff()} [gold]Guided Spirits[/gold]. Otherwise, gain {Value2:diff()} [gold]Divine Spirits[/gold]
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-REAPERS_DUE.descript:
For every {Energy:energyIcons()} spent: Gain {Value1:diff()} [gold]Guided Spirits[/gold].
For every {Energy2:energyIcons()} spent: Apply {Value2:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] to ALL enemies.
For every {Energy3:energyIcons()} spent: Gain {Value3:diff()} [gold]Divine Spirits[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-REAPERS_DUE.title: Reaper's Due
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-CLOSE_QUARTER_TECHNI:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Apply {Value1:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold].
If [gold]Distance[/gold] is less than 3: Target loses {Value2:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn and you gain {Value3:diff()} [gold]Guided Spirits[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-FERRIAGE_DEEP_FOG.de:
[gold]Displace[/gold] by up to -{Value1:diff()}.
Apply {Value2:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] for every level of [gold]Displacement[/gold].
[gold]Release[/gold] {ReleaseCost}: Gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn for every {Value3:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] on the target.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-FERRIAGE_DEEP_FOG.ex: [gold]Release[/gold] {ReleaseCost}: Gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn for every {Value3:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] on the target.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SHORT_LIFE_EXPECTANC:
[gold]Release[/gold] {Value1:diff()}: Deal half the target's current life ({CalculatedDamage:diff()}) as damage.
If the target is an elite or boss, you must [gold]Release[/gold] {Value2:diff()} instead.
[gold]Release[/gold] {ReleaseCost:diff()}: Deal half the target's current life ({CalculatedDamage:diff()}) as damage.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-ETHICALLY_SOURCED_BR:
[gold]Summon[/gold] {Value1:diff()}. Heal {Heal:diff()} HP. Gain {Value2:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
End your turn. At the start of your next turn, end your turn.
At the start of your next turn after that, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-INFERNO_TEMPEST.desc:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] ALL cards EVERYWHERE. Gain {Value3:diff()} [gold]Divine Spirits[/gold] per [gold]Hand[/gold] card, {Value1:diff()} [gold]Guided Spirit{Value1:plural:|s}[/gold] per [gold]Draw[/gold] card, and apply {Value1:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirit{Value1:plural:|s}[/gold] to ALL enemies per [gold]Discard[/gold] card.
Start of next turn, choose up to {Value2:diff()} non-[gold]Basic[/gold] [gold]Exhausted[/gold] cards to return randomly into the three piles. Then, return all [gold]Basics[/gold] to your [gold]Draw[/gold] pile.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-INFERNO_TEMPEST.titl: Souls at the end of the Road
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-LONESOME_LILY.descri:
Whenever you play a [gold]Spider Lily[/gold], add a [gold]Maul[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Add {Value1:diff()} [gold]Spider Lil{Value1:plural:y|ies}[/gold] into your [gold]Draw[/gold] pile.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-LONESOME_LILY.title: Lonesome Lily
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-STRONGEST_SPIRIT.des:
Deal [blue]{Damage:diff()}[/blue] damage. Apply [blue]{Value1:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold].
[gold]Release[/gold] [blue]{ReleaseCost:diff()}[/blue]: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Attack again for each card [gold]Exhausted[/gold]. If [blue]9[/blue] or more cards were [gold]Exhausted[/gold], gain [blue]{Value2:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-STRONGEST_SPIRIT.ext: [gold]Release[/gold] [blue]{ReleaseCost:diff()}[/blue]: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Attack again for each card [gold]Exhausted[/gold]. If [blue]9[/blue] or more cards were [gold]Exhausted[/gold], gain [blue]{Value2:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-EXCHANGE_LIVING_AND_: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] the top card of your [gold]Draw[/gold] pile. Return another [gold]Exhausted[/gold] card of the same type (Attack, Skill, etc) to your [gold]Hand[/gold]. If you can't, draw {Value1:diff()} cards.
Exchange of the Living and Dead
Choose a card to return to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] 1 card from the [gold]Draw[/gold] pile.
At the start of your second turn after this card was played, add that card to your [gold]Hand[/gold] and [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card. Return it to the hand [gold]Upgraded[/gold] in 2 turns.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-TOUR_GUIDE_TO_THE_NE:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. For each drawn card's rarity:
Uncommon: Gain {Value2:diff()} [gold]Guided Spirits[/gold]. Rare: Gain {Value3:diff()} [gold]Divine Spirits[/gold]. Other: Apply {Value1:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] to ALL enemies.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-STYGIAN_REEL.descrip:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. [gold]Displace[/gold] by -{Value1:diff()}.
At the start of that enemy's turn, [gold]Displace[/gold] by +{Value1:diff()}.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-STYGIAN_REEL.title: Stygian Reel
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-POSSESSED_ARMAMENT.d: Whenever you deal unblocked attack damage, apply {Value1:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirit{Value1:plural:|s}[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-RECURSIVE_SOULS.desc: Whenever a card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], gain {Value1:diff()} [gold]Guided Spirit{Value1:plural:|s}[/gold]
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-RIVERSIDE_VIEW.descr:
{IfUpgraded:show:Add a [gold]Spider Lily[/gold] to the [gold]Hand[/gold]
|}At the start of your turn, if you have no [gold]Spider Lily[/gold] in your [gold]Hand[/gold], add one. 
[gold]Spider Lilies[/gold] only give you one [gold]Poison[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-RIVERSIDE_VIEW.title: Riverside View
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-STORM_OF_THE_GRIEVIN:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage X times.
If X is 2 or more, add a [gold]Spider Lily[/gold] to the [gold]Discard[/gold] pile.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SHINIGAMI_FORM.descr:
{IfUpgraded:show:Add a [gold]Manipulate Distance[/gold] to the [gold]Hand[/gold]
|}Close [gold]Distances[/gold] increases damage taken by enemies by a further 100%/50%. Far [gold]Distances[/gold] reduce damage dealt by enemies by a further 15%/30%. The latter is unstackable.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SHINIGAMI_FORM.title: Shinigami Form
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-PARASITIC_POLLEN.des: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Value1:diff()} times. Add a [gold]Spider Lily[/gold] to the [gold]Draw[/gold] pile. If you are [gold]Poisoned[/gold], lose {Value2:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold] and apply double that amount to the target.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-EXTINCT_FAUNA.descri: When you play a card: If an [gold]Exhausted[/gold] card shares the same name: You may return one to your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Otherwise, create an [gold]Exhausted[/gold] [gold]Clone[/gold] whose cost is reduced to {Energy:energyIcons()}. Each effect can only be used once per turn.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-EXTINCT_FAUNA.title: Extinct Fauna of the Sanzu River
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-OASIS.description: Choose 1 card from the [gold]Discard[/gold] or [gold]Exhaust[/gold] piles. [gold]Clone[/gold] it to the Hand. [gold]Retain[/gold] it this turn.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-OASIS.title: Oasis of Passing Souls
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-OASIS.selectionScree: Choose a card to [gold]Clone[/gold]. It is [gold]Retained[/gold] this turn.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-EIKI_FREE_RELEASE.de: You do not pay the [gold]Release[/gold] cost of cards.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-TIP_OF_THE_REAPER.de:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
When [gold]Exhausted[/gold]: Add a [gold]Manipulate Distance[/gold] to the [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-GHOSTRICK_SHOT.descr:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Apply {Value1:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold].
When [gold]Exhausted[/gold]: Apply {Value2:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] to ALL enemies.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-GHOSTRICK_SHOT.title: Ghostrick Shot
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-DOUBLE_HOOKING.descr: Discard 1 card, then choose up to 2 cards in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold]. Add the first to your [gold]Hand[/gold], and the second to your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold]. They cost no energy until played.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-DOUBLE_HOOKING.title: Double Hooking
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-DOUBLE_HOOKING.selec: Choose up to 2 cards. The first card is added to your [gold]Hand[/gold], and the second is added to your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
